race.description: De Bortoli Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: EXPENSIVE ICON (2) wasn't that far away on debut when anchored with the 59kg for a game third in the heavy conditions over 1000m at this track. Trained locally and can put these away over the 1250m. FASHION SPREE (10) slow into stride and chipped away late with a battling sixth over 1400m at this track. Senior rider hops on and the blinkers come off. Can race a touch closer and play a leading role. NULKABA STAR (6) sharp improver in stronger company with a fighting second over 1200m at Gosford in a Super Maiden. Finds an easier assignment and can overcome the awkward draw. SUNNY QUARTERS (13) even debut when fourth over 1000m here just over three-weeks-ago. Has further upside and should get through the going.
